title: SHOWER FACILITIES - 211info
text: MEN'S MISSION SHOWER FACILITIES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers shower facilities. 777 Commercial Street NE Salem, OR 973010431 Eligibility: Adults age 18 and older and minors accompanied by a parent or guardian who are experiencing homelessness. Service animals accepted. Hours: 7 days per week 9am-4:30pm Email (503) 362-3983 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 362-3983 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Marion and Polk Counties SITE HOURS: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: On the corner of Commercial and Center Streets. Accessible via Salem Mass Transit Bus 1. Enter through the large double doors at the courtyard on the south side of the building. Services: Public Showers/Baths * Homeless Families Public Showers/Baths * Homeless Men Public Showers/Baths * Homeless Women Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY FACILITIES/CENTERS - DAY ROOM FOOD - MEALS HOUSING/SHELTER - MEN SHELTER SPECIALTY MEDICINE - FOOT CLINIC If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. MEN'S MISSION
